raw_consumer_statement:
I used my Citi credit card to pay for a prepaid service package. The service was discontinued before completion due to medical safety concerns after a XXXX  injury, which made continued use unsafe and not feasible. 

The merchant canceled future services but refused to refund the unused portion of the prepaid service. I then filed a billing dispute with Citi, explaining that this was not a voluntary cancellation and that the dispute involved services paid for but not fully rendered. 

Citi denied the dispute and marked it as customer responsibility, treating the situation as a voluntary cancellation. I requested reconsideration, but Citi closed the dispute without appropriately addressing that the service could not be completed due to safety concerns. 

I am submitting this complaint because the dispute was closed without proper consideration of services not rendered for a prepaid service that could not be safely used.
